---
id: enable-profile
title: "Enable a Profile"
description: "Transitions status from `DRAFT` or `DISABLED` to `ENABLED`."
sidebar_label: "Enable a Profile"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/transform-platform-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Enable a Profile"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/profiles/{profileId}/enable"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Transitions status from `DRAFT` or `DISABLED` to `ENABLED`.
Immediately schedules window cron jobs and begins monitoring integration channels.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>

>
